POSTGRES_DB=elephant
POSTGRES_USER=elephant
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_STRONG_PASSWORD
POSTGRES_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://elephant:CHANGE_ME_STRONG_PASSWORD@postgres:5432/elephant

REDIS_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_REDIS_PASSWORD

NEO4J_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_NEO4J_PASSWORD

ELEPHANT_ENV=development
LOG_LEVEL=INFO
DAILY_BUDGET_USD=10.00

# API KEYS (Stage 5 - bos birakin simdilik)
